tree.node:
I always end up wandering to this place…
Continue

You used to drag me here every day, said that the gods|listened to our prayers better at sunrise.
Continue

I almost wanted to believe you at some point,|you’re always right after all.
Continue

But if they really listened to my prayers…|Why are you not coming back to me?
Continue

Damn it, why would you want to go to the castle?|No one comes back from there anymore, not even you…
Continue

I don’t know what I’ll find inside...|but I can’t stand here waiting anymore.
Continue

Nia, I’m coming to find you.
Continue

Hi this is my test dialog num 2
Answer 1
Answer 2

This is my test reply 1
Single answer 1

This is my test reply 2
Single answer 2

This is the last reply
End conversation
